business.suspendedMessage: This account is currently suspended. Please contact support for more information.

branding.title: Branding & White-label
branding.noWhiteLabelWarning: White-label features (custom CSS, hide branding) require the Enterprise plan. Basic branding customization is still available.
branding.logoHint: Upload an image file (PNG, JPG or SVG). Max 2MB.
branding.coverHint: Large image shown on your public booking pages.
branding.faviconHint: Icon shown in the browser tab.
branding.customCssHint: Custom CSS will be injected into public pages. Use with care.
branding.hideBrandingLabel: Hide Puncto branding on public pages
branding.linkInBioDescription: This is the public address of your Puncto page.
branding.linkInBioSupportNote: To change the URL, please contact support.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Configure how your business communicates via WhatsApp
whatsapp.modeManualDesc: Free & Starter plans: Select a contact and click a button to open WhatsApp with a preset message. You send it manually.
whatsapp.modeAutomatedDesc: Growth & Pro plans: Messages are sent automatically via WhatsApp Business API. Configured securely on our backend.
whatsapp.presetMessagePlaceholder: Hello! Your appointment is confirmed for {date} at {time}. See you soon!
whatsapp.presetMessageHint: This message is pre-filled when you click "Send WhatsApp" on a contact. Use {date} and {time} as placeholders.
whatsapp.howItWorksManual: In Manual mode, when you click "Send WhatsApp" on a customer or booking, the app opens WhatsApp (mobile or web) with the preset message ready. You review and send it yourself.
whatsapp.step3: Click "Send WhatsApp" next to a contact.
whatsapp.step4: WhatsApp opens with the message pre-filled. Send it manually.
whatsapp.howItWorksAutomated: In Automated mode, the system sends reminders and confirmations directly to your clients' WhatsApp via the Meta WhatsApp Business API. All API configuration is managed securely on our backend—nothing sensitive is exposed to users.
whatsapp.connectDesc: Connect your business WhatsApp number so automated messages are sent from your number to your clients.
whatsapp.connectNotConfigured: Embedded Signup is not configured. Contact support to enable per-business WhatsApp.
